description: Machine-readable environment contract for Destination Command Center control-plane wiring.

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: Primary Postgres/Neon URL for DB-backed telemetry, orders, and EarthOS persistence.

variables.name: INTERNAL_API_SECRET
variables.description: Auth secret for internal APIs, corridor event smoke, and system checks.

variables.name: FEASTLY_PAYMENT_CHECKOUT_URL
variables.description: Feastly checkout continuation URL used by production readiness and local parity checks.

variables.name: DCC_RESEND_API_KEY
variables.description: Central DCC Resend key for deploy email smoke and future control-plane mailer.

variables.name: RESEND_API_KEY
variables.description: App-level Resend key where code paths still read the generic provider name.

variables.name: DCC_SATELLITE_SECRET
variables.description: Shared local/dev satellite bootstrap secret for runtime-kit parity.

variables.name: DCC_SATELLITE_WEBHOOK_TOKEN
variables.description: Shared fallback webhook token for local satellite callback validation.

variables.name: DCC_SHUTTLEYA_WEBHOOK_TOKEN
variables.description: Scoped Shuttleya callback token for production blast-radius isolation.

variables.name: DCC_PARR_WEBHOOK_TOKEN
variables.description: Scoped PARR callback token for Red Rocks booking lifecycle events.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SQUARE_APP_ID
variables.description: Public Square app identifier for payment smoke and system integrity checks.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SQUARE_LOCATION_ID
variables.description: Public Square location identifier for payment smoke and system integrity checks.

variables.name: SQUARE_LOCATION_ID
variables.description: Server-side Square location identifier for DCC-owned payment-capable paths.

variables.name: SQUARE_ACCESS_TOKEN
variables.description: Square server token for DCC-owned payment-capable paths.

variables.name: MAIL_FROM_DCC
variables.description: DCC-branded sender identity for Mission Control email.

variables.name: EARTHOS_APPROVAL_TO
variables.description: Comma-separated default recipients for EarthOS mission approvals.
